series_metadata.series_description: Funds available for the repair, relocation, or replacement of Auxiliary Service mobile units upon demonstration of need and approval from the Department of Education. This includes forms SF-238 and SF-239.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Five years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Five years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
